title: تنقيط حرف الظاء
instruction_en: Trace the dotted letter ظ (thaa/zaa). Single-letter dotted-tracing worksheet: a name line (الاسم) at top, a large reference letter and an example picture, the letter shown with stroke-order arrows, then rows of dotted ظ to trace over.

items.activity: traceLetter — reference: large ظ and a picture of an envelope (ظرف, envelope); the example word ظرف is shown with the ظ highlighted
traceLetter — stroke-order model of ظ with directional arrows (dotted start point + arrows)
traceLetter — two rows of dotted ظ forms to trace over the baseline (left columns plain dotted outline, right columns add stroke-order arrows)

notes: Single-letter dotted-tracing worksheet for ظ (thaa). Folder has m001.jpeg (grayscale), m003.jpg (a colored variant of the same page, not separately viewed but same layout by file pattern) and m002.wdp (JPEG-XR, not viewable). No Arabic instruction sentence printed — only the name field (الاسم) heading and the example word ظرف (envelope, matching the envelope illustration). Footer credit: learnwithanas.blogspot.com. Tracing rows show the ظ form with its single dot above; stroke-order arrows indicate the loop/body first. Read by sight; clear.
